attacking_style: Aggressive breakaway rider who launches premature solo efforts on climbs, often going too early and getting caught before or at the summit (meters from the line).
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine clear team support patterns; appears to ride opportunistically in breakaways without coordinated team setup.
terrain_preference: Shows willingness to attack on summit finishes, but lacks the power reserve to sustain efforts to the line. Exposed on finishing climbs where timing and sustained power are critical.
vulnerability: Poor pacing judgment on climbs - consistently attacks too far from finish, depleting power reserves and getting caught within sight of the line. Lacks the explosive finish needed after hard climbing efforts.
key_patterns: Launches solo attacks prematurely on climbs, caught before summit (2 observations)
Insufficient power reserve for summit finishes despite animated racing (2 observations)
Breakaway-oriented racing style, aggressive but tactically naive timing (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Multiple failed attacks due to premature efforts and power depletion suggest poor form or tactical judgment in early 2017
